reasoning: The historical closing price for IVZ on 2026-01-16 was $29.20. In the last few weeks leading up to 2026-01-18, the stock experienced a stark rise from ~$26 at the end of December 2025 to over $29 on positive news combining a $500M buyback and LGT deal. Standard statistical models (using the provided tool) give a 0.41 probability for the Jan 25 mark to surpass $29.20 due to reversion from the fast run-up. The Q4 2025 earnings are set for January 27, 2026. Therefore, the stock remains insulated from earnings risk on Jan 25, 2026. However, by mid-February (Feb 17, 2026), the price will likely be marked down due to IVZ's ~$0.21 quarterly dividend, which has an ex-dividend date around Feb 14 based on precedent. Given general drift properties, I forecast probability slightly below half for both. I adjust closer to 0.50 than the 0.41 raw estimate point because trends can persist and drift is slightly positive overall. For Jan 25, P = 0.44. For Feb 17, increased uncertainty balances out against a sure nominal hit (dividend) and earnings risk. Giving ~0.41.
